mdRecord.dcterms:title: Course Catalog, 1988-89
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Bulletin, Vol. 80, No. 3. Annual course catalog of Virginia Polytechnic University: including campus maps; facility descriptions; lists of courses, schedules, students, and faculty; and other information relating to the operations of the institution. Virginia Polytechnic Institute published its annual catalog as an issue of the Bulletin of the Virginia Polytechnic Institute from April 1908 - October 1989 inclusive.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University
